title: jurinea bracteata
intro: Jurinea bracteata, also known as the Mongolian thistle or Russian thistle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties. Jurinea bracteata has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and acting as an expectorant to relieve respiratory problems. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
